title: Relation links are hash-covered: slugs assigned first, embedded in packs — a sibling rename re-renders its linkers
context: Shipped from the roadmap — the accepted residual from the e2e audit: relation links used a render-time slug map outside every hash, so a slug reassignment could leave a fresh page linking to a renamed sibling.
decision: wikiStatus assigns ALL component slugs first (single authority), passes the map into assemblePack, and packs embed each relation's slug (dependsOn/usedBy gain a hashed slug field). renderPage links from the pack — the render-time slugById parameter is gone. A sibling rename now changes every linking pack's hash → wiki-stale → --heal re-renders the linkers with the new target. Locked by test: rename Core→Kernel flags and re-links the page that depends on it.
alternatives_rejected: Hashing the global slug map into every page: any component's rename would stale ALL pages, not just its linkers — per-pack slugs scope the blast correctly
